text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Members of the Many Many Memories Club, 
what memory should we make next?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wait, since when did I join that club?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You mean like that time you put on a Machan 
puppet show for the kids in the park, or when
everyone did the Umapyoi Legend dance in 
the courtyard…?

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Since I don't have to explain, we can 
focus our energy on creating memories with 
the biggest impact.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oof, this is a bit too embarrassing 
for me, sorry!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Um, I don't think we have to do anything 
too special. Perhaps we can just hang out 
like usual, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Oh yeah! Let's just do things 
like normal, and something memorable 
is bound to happen!

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text: Hm, something out of the ordinary… Oh.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
How about a game of "No Holds Barred, 
Disguise and Bribe Your Way to the Top Kick 
the Can Survival"?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well that does sound pretty… 
Pretty lit, now that you mention it.
